entity.summary: Canada-based cryptocurrency trading platform launched in April 2018 and continuing to operate through the Newton brand.
entity.notes: Newton's official company timeline identifies April 12, 2018 as the public launch marker. The current official domain remains accessible and identifies the Canadian operating company.

events.title: Newton cryptocurrency trading platform launched

events.notes: The date is preserved in Newton's official company timeline and independent exchange coverage.
